notes: Core mechanics partially work but barrel physics are buggy (falling logic broken, barrels don't properly traverse girders), death state instantly respawns without animation, climbing detection is too strict, visual representation is minimal colored rectangles/circles rather than proper DK sprites, and the level win condition triggers too easily near the top platform.

Core mechanics are present but flawed: the hammer only grants invincibility instead of destroying barrels, and the player must unintuitively jump while standing next to Pauline to trigger the win condition.
Core loop runs and basic movement/jumping/climbing exist, but scoring/combat/life handling are notably incomplete or inaccurate and the result only loosely resembles and plays like Donkey Kong.
